committees_scope_target_check.name: committees_scope_target_check
committees_scope_target_check.value:
("committees"."scope" = 'school'         AND "committees"."classroom_id" IS NULL     AND "committees"."event_plan_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("committees"."scope" = 'all_classrooms' AND "committees"."classroom_id" IS NULL     AND "committees"."event_plan_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("committees"."scope" = 'classroom'      AND "committees"."classroom_id" IS NOT NULL AND "committees"."event_plan_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("committees"."scope" = 'event_plan'     AND "committees"."event_plan_id" IS NOT NULL AND "committees"."classroom_id" IS NULL)

committees_capacity_check.name: committees_capacity_check
committees_capacity_check.value:
"committees"."capacity_mode" = 'open'
       OR ("committees"."capacity_mode" = 'capped' AND "committees"."max_size" IS NOT NULL AND "committees"."max_size" > 0)

event_contact_links_one_target.name: event_contact_links_one_target
event_contact_links_one_target.value: ("event_contact_links"."event_catalog_id" IS NOT NULL AND "event_contact_links"."event_plan_id" IS NULL) OR ("event_contact_links"."event_catalog_id" IS NULL AND "event_contact_links"."event_plan_id" IS NOT NULL)

event_plan_members_identity.name: event_plan_members_identity
event_plan_members_identity.value: "event_plan_members"."user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "event_plan_members"."placeholder_name" IS NOT NULL
